descriptionKey.english: Your units gain +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] and +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health] per 10 cards in your deck.
descriptionKey.french: Vos unités gagnent +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] et +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health] par tranche de <nobr>10 cartes</nobr> dans votre deck.
descriptionKey.german: Deine Einheiten erhalten für alle 10 Karten in deinem Deck +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] und +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health].
descriptionKey.russian: Ваши бойцы получают +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] и +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health] за каждые 10 карт в колоде.
descriptionKey.portuguese: Suas unidades recebem +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] e +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health] para cada 10 cartas em seu deck.
descriptionKey.chinese: 你的卡组中每有 10 张卡牌，你的单位就获得 +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]和 +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]。
descriptionKey.spanish: Todas las unidades añaden +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack] y +[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health] por cada 10 cartas en tu mazo.
descriptionKey.japanese: デッキのカード10毎につき、ユニットが+[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][attack]と+[effect0.upgrade.bonushp][health]を得る。
